posts.text: Use automation to accelerate repetitive transforms — transcription cleanup, first-draft notes, formatting, asset packaging. But never automate the approval step. Someone still has to own correctness, tone, and release quality before anything goes public. Ep. 14 out now.
At what point in your production workflow does a raw transcript become trustworthy enough to build on? Ep. 14 digs into where that line sits — and what breaks when teams skip the review step.
